title: Accessible Autocomplete

statement.markdown:
# Accessible Autocomplete

You need to create an autocomplete input field with a predefined list of options. The user should be able to select from the list or type in their own value. The selected value should be displayed below the input field.

### Requirements

1. The input field should be accessible for screen readers.
2. The list of options should be hidden by default and should be shown on focus.
3. The selected value should be updated in real-time.
4. The list of options should be filtered as the user types.

constraints: Only Tailwind CSS classes are allowed for styling
All functionality should work in a modern desktop browser

starterCode.javascript:
const input = document.getElementById('input');
const list = document.getElementById('list');

gradingCriteria.description: Input field is accessible for screen readers
List of options is hidden by default and shown on focus
Selected value is updated in real-time
List of options is filtered as the user types
